LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS TSC ACQUISITION AND GEMINI PARTNERS' MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 24, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS TSC ACQUISITION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION & GEMINI PARTNERS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THE CLAIM WITH SUFFICIENT PARTICULARITY. DEFENDANT GEMINI'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE BREACH OF CONTRACT, BREACH OF IMPLIED COVENANT, DECLARATORY RELIEF, AND SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF CONCEDES THAT GEMINI IS NOT A SIGNATORY TO THE CONTRACT. SEE OPPENHEIMER V. GENERAL CABLE CORP. (1956) 143 CAL.APP.2D 293. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FRAUD AND NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION CAUSE OF ACTION. GEMINI CAN BE LIABLE FOR ITS OWN TORTS AND/OR PARTICIPATING WITH TSC IN THE COMMISSION OF A TORT. IN ADDITION, AN AGENT CAN BE PERSONALLY LIABLE WHERE ITS ACTS ARE WRONGFUL. SEE CC 2343(3). DEFENDANTS ASK FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE "NOVEMBER SUMMARY" AGREEMENT AND PLAINTIFF DOES NOT OPPOSE. THE PARTIES AGREE THAT GEMINI IS NOT A SIGNATORY TO THE NOVEMBER SUMMARY. THE COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THIS FACT, ALTHOUGH NEITHER PARTY HAS PROVIDED A COPY OF THE SUMMARY IN CONNECTION WITH THIS DEMURRER. SEE ASCHERMAN V. GENERAL REINSURANCE GROUP, 183 CAL. APP. 3D 307, 310 (TAKING JUDICIAL NOTICE OF CONTRACT WHERE THERE WAS NO DISPUTE OVER THE EXISTENCE OF THE CONTRACT ALLEGED IN PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT). IN THE FUTURE, THE PARTIES MUST PROVIDE THE COURT A COPY OF ANY DOCUMENT FOR WHICH IT REQUESTS JUDICIAL NOTICE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-20-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-24-2013 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTs TSC ACQUISITION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION & GEMINI PARTNERS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - Defendants' demurrer to the fraud cause of action is overruled. Plaintiff alleges the claim with sufficient particularity. Defendant Gemini's demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the breach of contract, breach of implied covenant, declaratory relief, and specific performance causes of action. Plaintiff concedes that Gemini is not a signatory to the contract. See Oppenheimer v. General Cable Corp. (1956) 143 Cal.App.2d 293. The demurrer is overruled as to the fraud and negligent misrepresentation cause of action. Gemini can be liable for its own torts and/or participating with TSC in the commission of a tort. In addition, an agent can be personally liable where its acts are wrongful. See CC 2343(3). Defendants ask for judicial notice of the "November Summary" agreement and Plaintiff does not oppose. The parties agree that Gemini is not a signatory to the November Summary. The Court takes judicial notice of this fact, although neither party has provided a copy of the Summary in connection with this demurrer. See Ascherman v. General Reinsurance Group, 183 Cal. App. 3d 307, 310 (taking judicial notice of contract where there was no dispute over the existence of the contract alleged in plaintiff's complaint). In the future, the parties must provide the Court a copy of any document for which it requests judicial notice. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-24-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTs TSC ACQUISITION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION & GEMINI PARTNERS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied. The prayer for punitive damages is proper based on the fraud cause of action. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANTs TSC ACQUISITION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION, GEMINI PARTNERS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's Motion To Change Venue And For Sanctions is denied. Defendants have not met their burden to show that venue is improper in San Francisco. Request for attorney fees is denied. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Applciaton And Hering For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jan-18-2013 Denied

No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF WHITE OAK GLOBAL ADVISORS' Applicaton For Right To Attach Order and For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is Denied. Plaintiff failed to show that it has a probability of prevailing on the merits. In considering the evidence presented, it appears equally plausible that Defendants may prevail.
